channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Coinage Fund Management Secures SEC Licence to Operate in Nigeria
item.description: Coinage Fund Management Ltd, wey be Africa-focused investment company, don receive approval from Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Nigeria to operate as Fund and Portfolio Manager. According to...

item.title: Strong 6.1-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Eastern Samar
item.description: A magnitude 6.1 earthquake struck Eastern Samar on May 4, 2026, causing concern among residents in the affected areas. According to initial reports, the tremor was felt across several towns and cities...

item.title: Two Kano Federal Lawmakers Resign from ADC Over Party Changes
item.description: Two members of the House of Representatives from Kano State don exit the African Democratic Congress (ADC) recently. Sani Adamu Wakili, wey dey represent Minjibir/Ungogo Federal Constituency, send let...

item.title: Larvotto Reports Strong High-Grade Gold, Antimony and Tungsten Intercepts at Hillgrove, NSW
item.description: Larvotto Resources has reported further encouraging diamond drilling results from its Midas Gully system at the Metz Mining Centre, part of the Hillgrove gold-antimony project in New South Wales. Key ...

item.title: Preparing Canadian Schools for Responsible AI Integration in Education
item.description: As artificial intelligence (AI) continues to advance at a rapid pace, Canadian education leaders face the challenge of integrating it responsibly and effectively. AI is no longer a futuristic tool—it ...

item.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 achieves record-breaking box office success internationally
item.description: The Devil Wears Prada 2 has opened to spectacular success worldwide, earning US$234 million in its debut weekend. In Australia alone, it achieved the highest opening of the year, raking in AU$11.03 mi...

item.title: Kenya Seeks More Japanese Investment to Boost Economic Growth
item.description: President William Ruto has urged more Japanese companies to invest in Kenya, highlighting opportunities for public-private partnerships in commercially viable projects. Speaking at State House in Nair...

item.title: Economist Warns U.S. Gas Prices Could Remain High for Years Due to Global Supply Disruptions
item.description: Economist Henrietta Treyz, co-founder of Veda Partners and director of economic policy, provided a sobering forecast about the future of gas prices during a segment on MS NOW. When asked by anchor Ale...

item.title: House Justice Committee Sends VP Sara Duterte Impeachment Report to Plenary
item.description: The House Committee on Justice has approved the committee report regarding the impeachment case filed against Vice President Sara Duterte. The report, which formally outlines the grounds for impeachme...

item.title: NCC leader accuses SAPS and Police Commissioner Mkhwanazi of wrongful conduct after raid on Mitchell's Plain house
item.description: Fadiel Adams, leader of the National Coloured Congress (NCC), has made serious accusations against the South African Police Service (SAPS) and KwaZulu-Natal Police Commissioner Nhlanhla Mkhwanazi foll...

item.title: US Begins Operations to Facilitate Safe Passage of Ships Through Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions with Iran
item.description: The United States has announced that it will begin guiding merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global oil and gas trade, amid ongoing tensions with Iran. The US stre...

item.title: House of Representatives moves closer to initiating Sara Duterte impeachment
item.description: The House of Representatives in the Philippines has recorded 56 votes in favor of impeaching Vice President Sara Duterte, signaling growing support for the measure. Justice committee member Terry Rido...

item.title: Key Considerations Before Repeatedly Withdrawing from Your Two-Pot Retirement Savings
item.description: Since the introduction of the two-pot retirement withdrawal system in September 2024, an increasing number of South Africans are accessing their retirement savings to manage immediate financial pressu...

item.title: ASIC investigates share trading by Accent Group executives
item.description: Accent Group has confirmed that the Australian Securities and Investments Commission (ASIC) is conducting an investigation into potential insider trading involving its chief executive, Daniel Agostine...

item.title: Poll Shows Rising Gas Prices Leading Republicans to Blame Trump
item.description: CNN's chief data analyst Harry Enten highlighted a significant polling trend showing that even Donald Trump's most loyal Republican supporters are increasingly blaming him for rising gas prices linked...

item.title: Understanding the NZ-India Free Trade Agreement and Its Economic Implications
item.description: The recently signed free trade agreement between New Zealand and India has sparked debate over its potential economic and social impacts. The deal aims to reduce barriers to trade in goods, services, ...

item.title: United Airlines Flight Strikes Light Pole During Landing at Newark Airport
item.description: A United Airlines flight experienced a troubling incident as it was landing at Newark Liberty International Airport. The aircraft, which was approaching from the air, struck a light pole located along...

item.title: Roblox Reports Slower Growth Following Mandatory Age-Verification Implementation
item.description: Roblox has revised its full-year 2026 bookings forecast downward by approximately $900 million, citing stronger-than-expected headwinds from the mandatory age-verification rollout. Introduced in Janua...

item.title: Moses Kuria Identifies Key Swing Counties for 2027 Presidential Race
item.description: Former Trade CS Moses Kuria has highlighted the counties likely to influence the 2027 presidential election in Kenya. Speaking on TV47, he explained that out of the 2.35 million newly registered voter...

item.title: Senator Ole Kina Calls for Halt to New Projects and Off-Budget Spending
item.description: Narok Senator Ledama Ole Kina has called for the government to stop introducing new projects in the 2026/2027 budget, urging that ongoing projects be completed and pending bills settled. In a statemen...
